name: The Saturday Market at Tagawa Gardens
notes: The on-file website (tagawagardens.com) is confirmed as the real, live official site of Tagawa Gardens (a garden center/nursery in Centennial, CO) and is correct to keep — it just returns HTTP 403 to automated fetchers (likely bot protection), so the main site and pages like /learn/calendar/, /contact-us/, /visit-us/ could not be read directly. Its e-commerce subdomain (shop.tagawagardens.com), which is on the same official domain, was fetchable and yielded general store hours and a contact email. However, 'The Saturday Market' does not appear to be a separate, distinct weekly farmers-market event with its own official page or Facebook — it is effectively the seasonal produce/farm-market section of the Tagawa Gardens garden center itself (per third-party listings like landcan.org/coloradolandcan.org and colorado.com, which describe it as 'open year-round for garden center and jarred foods, seasonally for produce'). No official page states a Saturday-only schedule, so the Hours field above reflects the garden center's general daily hours, not market-specific hours — treat with some caution. No official mention found for Months Open (produce is described only as 'seasonal' without specific months), Products (beyond general descriptions on third-party aggregator sites, not confirmed on an official page), SNAP acceptance, official Facebook/Instagram (facebook.com/TagawaGardens/ exists but its content could not be read to confirm market-specific details, so it was not added as the Facebook field since it's unclear whether it's presented as this market's own page vs. the general garden center's page), ADA accessibility, or Certified Organic status. Address on file (7711 S. Parker Rd., Centennial, CO 80016) matches all sources found and was not changed. Phone (303) 690-4722 appears consistently across third-party sources (colorado.com, Yelp, etc.) but could not be confirmed on an official tagawagardens.com page directly, so it was omitted per the 'clearly stated on official source' rule.
